Picture.title: Picture
Picture.description: An uploaded image post containing metadata, uploader info, and approval status.

id.description: Unique identifier of the picture document.

description.description: A description or story about the picture.

imageUrl.description: The URL of the displayed image, either external or from presets.

uploaderId.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the uploader.

uploaderRole.description: Role of the uploader at the time of uploading.

status.description: Approval status of the picture. Admin uploads are pre-approved.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the picture was uploaded.

approvedBy.description: The UID of the admin who approved this picture.

approvedAt.description: Timestamp when the picture was approved.

likes.description: Number of likes this picture has received.

category.description: Category tag of the picture (e.g. Nature, Travel, City, Abstract, Cyberpunk).

Like.title: Like
Like.description: Tracks which user liked which picture to prevent duplicate likes.

/pictures/{pictureId}/likes/{likeId}.description: Tracks users who liked this picture.
